title: Surgeon Vacancy at Care Hospitals Ventures Solutions - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at Care Hospitals Ventures Solutions - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at Care Hospitals Ventures Solutions are looking for an experienced Surgeon based out of Mumbai. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Care Hospitals Ventures Solutions:
Care Hospitals Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual performance appraisal
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Care Hospitals Ventures Solutions!
